---
name: Feature request
about: New template, new validator rule, or improvement to an existing template
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### What would you like to add?

<!-- Plain language. -->

### If this is a new template…

- schema.org @type (e.g. `Event`, `LocalBusiness`, `JobPosting`):
- Link to the canonical schema.org page for this type:
- Why teams need this (use case + the AI surface where it pays off):
- Required fields you believe should be enforced by `validate.js`:
- Are you willing to ship the matching `examples/<type>.example.json`? (PRs are easier to review with examples.)

> See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) for the file-naming
> convention, required-field map, and validator rules.

### If this is a validator rule or template improvement…

- Existing template affected:
- Behaviour you want (e.g. "warn when `offers` is present without `priceCurrency`"):
- Why the current rule misses this case:

### Alternatives considered

<!-- Optional. Other libraries / approaches you tried. -->
